title: Saudi Arabian Pul Kebabs
description: A keto twist on traditional kebabs, using Saudi Arabian spices and served with crispy flatbread.

ingredients.name: Saudi Arabian Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: available at Middle Eastern grocery stores

instructions: In a large bowl, combine pul, Saudi Arabian Spice Blend, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Thread pul mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush flatbread with buttery spread and grill until crispy.
Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked through.
Serve kebabs with crispy flatbread and a side of chopped biber pepper.
